title: elaeocarpus undulatus
intro: Elaeocarpus undulatus, commonly known as the Blue Bean or Blue Olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus undulatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and its extracts have been studied for their potential to inhibit the growth of certain cancer cells.
